description.value:
Receive Proposal medication agreement 23.3-vma-aanvullend-middel building blocks for patient J. XXX_Willemsz
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_vma_ontvangen
Original description: TEST scenarioset 23.3 VMA TEST scenarioset 23.3 VMA: Aanvullend middel VMA
Receive Proposal medication agreement 23.3-vma-aanvullend-middel resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '150002') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '174076') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '150002|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (MACROGOL/ZOUTEN PDR V DRANK (PLEINVUE))
